mutation: composite: prize-collecting selection (choose which pickup-delivery pairs to serve) added to a precedence-constrained depot-to-depot tour, objective = tour distance + unserved penalties (min)
title: Carnival Ride Circuit: Selective Pickup-Delivery Tour
strategies: do-nothing baseline: serve nobody, pay all penalties (ratio 0.1)
standalone greedy: serve jobs whose single depot round trip beats the penalty, chained in nearest-neighbour pickup order
prize-collecting cheapest insertion: repeatedly insert the most profitable pickup+delivery pair at its least-marginal-cost route position, then relocate pairs to trim the route
regret / local-search variants: 2-opt over the combined route, or-opt of pickup and delivery separately, penalty-tuned selection thresholds
